text:
Updates:
 1. Mplayer2 also test as's version, so it can trustfully test
cmov/ssse3 supports now.
 2. Merge some changes from the mplayer port (log2/logf, etc.)
 3. bluray.2;
 4. Let mplayer2 finds libass.
